channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla at $445: Buy, Sell or Hold?
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) at $445.27 is a hold. The stock has run 26.35% in the past month on a clean Q1 margin reset, but it now trades above the Street’s consensus target and at multiples that demand near-flawless execution on Cybercab, Robotaxi, and Optimus. Tesla is pitched as a physical AI company...

item.title: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) Vs The Rest Of The Automobile Manufacturing Stocks
item.description: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the automobile manufacturing stocks, including Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and its peers.

item.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to Tesla Sustainable Energy Business Trust 2026-1
item.description: NEW YORK, May 14, 2026--KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to four classes of notes totaling $359.87 million issued by Tesla Sustainable Business Energy Trust 2026-1 ("TSET 2026-1" or the "Issuer"), an ABS transaction secured by residential solar retail installment contracts ("RICs").

item.title: 8 Months Ago, Trump Called Elon Musk “Susceptible” on China — Now He’s Riding Shotgun on Air Force One
item.description: The market’s relationship with China has become a balancing act investors can’t ignore. Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) still depends on Chinese manufacturing. Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) desperately wants to break back into China to capitalize on demand for AI chips.

item.title: Volkswagen brings the ID. Buzz back for 2027, but now the ID.4 is on a brief hiatus
item.description: The ID. Buzz is coming back for the 2027 model year. While the electric van is set to return, Volkswagen said the ID.4 is now going on a brief hiatus.

item.title: Elon Musk vs. Jeff Bezos: The Three-Way War for the Future of Space-Based AI
item.description: On March 21, 2026, at the old Seaholm Power Plant in Austin, Elon Musk unveiled Terafab, a project to build 1 terawatt of AI compute capacity annually. Six weeks later, Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) signed on as foundational manufacturing partner, and shares rose 150.45% from April 1 through May 13. Jeff B...

item.title: Tesla puts Giga Berlin in Plaid Mode with new massive investment
item.description: Tesla is pushing forward with significant upgrades at its Gigafactory Berlin-Brandenburg in Grünheide, Germany, signaling renewed confidence in its European operations despite past market challenges. The facility, Tesla’s first in Europe, opened in 2022 and has become a cornerstone for Model Y pr...

item.title: Panasonic Raises EV Battery Outlook Based On Tesla's Sales Bounce
item.description: Tesla stock rose after one of its battery suppliers told investors it expected sales to the EV maker to grow this year.

item.title: Tesla Is Now Testing A Virtual Waitlist For Superchargers
item.description: Tesla is looking to solve charger congestion by adding a digital waitlist to Superchargers.

item.title: Can Tesla's $250M Berlin Expansion Strengthen Its EV Lead?
item.description: TSLA's $250 million Berlin expansion boosts battery output, adds 1,500 jobs and supports plans to raise EV production in Europe.

item.title: Ford Zooms 8% Higher, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Tesla
item.description: Shares of Ford (NYSE:F) are up 8% on Thursday morning, trading near $14.60 after closing yesterday at $13.57. The move extends a second straight session of decisive outperformance versus the Detroit and Austin peers. For context, Ford stock climbed 6% yesterday, and the two-day rip has been decis...

item.title: Trump Brought 17 CEOs to China. Only Two Got Seats on Air Force One: Elon Musk and Jensen Huang
item.description: President Trump’s delegation to Beijing this week included 17 American chief executives. Fifteen flew commercial or on corporate jets. Two boarded Air Force One: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk and NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang.

item.title: Tesla Stock Wobbles. Full Self-Driving in China Is a Hot Topic.
item.description: Tesla stock was bobbing up and down on Thursday, with investors still focused on China and self-driving technology. Coming into Thursday trading, Tesla stock has risen five of the past six days, gaining more than 14% over that span. With CEO Elon Musk traveling with President Donald Trump in Chi...

item.title: Tesla Has Sent Cybercabs Around The Country — Not Clear Why
item.description: Looking through the Robotaxi Tracker website yesterday, I noticed more while digging into the Cybercab Tracker. Tesla has apparently sent Cybercabs to several additional cities. Aside from Austin, where 34 Cybercabs have been spotted, one has been spotted in Wichita, Kansas; one has been spotted ...

item.title: Delta Airlines rejects Starlink, and the reason will probably shock you
item.description: SpaceX frontman Elon Musk explained on Wednesday why commercial airline Delta got cold feet over offering Starlink for stable internet on its flights — and the reason will probably shock you. In a pointed exchange on X, Elon Musk defended SpaceX’s uncompromising approach to Starlink’s in-flight i...

item.title: I helped design the original Tesla battery. Here’s how America can lead the world again
item.description: Trying to replicate China's graphite supply chain is a trap. We should look to the silicon anode technology already being manufactured in Washington state.

item.title: Tesla Faces Mixed China Reception
item.description: Elon Musk remains influential in China, but Tesla's position is being tested by local rivals and regulatory pressure.

item.title: Xi Jinping tells Nvidia, Tesla and Apple CEOs that China will ‘open wider’
item.description: Xi Jinping has told American chief executives travelling with Donald Trump that China’s door to business “will only open wider and wider” as...

item.title: Elon Musk’s $119 Billion Gambit: The Real Reason He’s Building the World’s Largest Chip Plant.
item.description: On March 21, 2026, at the Seaholm Power Plant in Austin, Elon Musk unveiled “the most epic chip-building exercise in history”: Terafab, a joint venture between Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI, with Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) as foundational manufacturing partner. The stated goal: one terawatt of AI...

item.title: Elon Musk Accused Of Building 'Most Management-Favorable' IPO Structure At SpaceX: Report
item.description: Top Pension officials from New York and California have written to SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, expressing concern over the “extreme” governance structure of the commercial space flight company ahead of its public listing. Comptrollers Express Concern New York State Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli, as well ...

item.title: Ron DeSantis Admits Tesla's Are Undeniably 'Top-Notch Products' But Rejects The Idea That 'EVs Will Save The World'
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Tuesday that he remains opposed to electric vehicle mandates but praised Tesla Inc.'s (NASDAQ:TSLA) vehicles as "absolutely top-notch products," crediting the company's technology and performance for building a loyal customer base. DeSantis Praises Tesla While R...

item.title: China's view on Elon Musk? Visionary, occasional villain
item.description: In China, Elon Musk has been the object of love - and occasional loathing. The Tesla boss has been both lauded as a visionary and criticised by Chinese regulators and the public for the alleged bungling of customer complaints. In addition, the dominance of SpaceX and its Starlink satellite unit h...

item.title: Gavin Newsom Unveils $1 Billion EV Incentive Program That Could Benefit Elon Musk's Tesla Semi
item.description: Governor Gavin Newsom (D-CA) on Wednesday unveiled a new EV rebate program in the state that could provide a major boost to Tesla Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:TSLA) Semi truck sales. $1 Billion EV Rebate Newsom took to X to share the news, saying that the rebate program would take effect from June 26, where “a...

item.title: Elon Musk Left For China With Trump During OpenAI Trial Despite Judge's 'Recall Status' Order: Report
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk reportedly accompanied President Donald Trump on his trip to China without seeking permission from the Judge currently presiding over the OpenAI trial. Elon Musk Defies ‘Recall Order’ Amid the ongoing trial in Oakland, California, U.S.

item.title: Elon Musk Chimes In As Delta Picks Amazon Leo Over Starlink: They Wanted To Make It 'Painful, Difficult And Expensive'
item.description: Elon Musk said Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE:DAL) passed on integrating SpaceX's Starlink internet because the carrier wanted passengers to use a branded login portal, while Starlink insisted on a seamless connection that works without one. Musk Says Delta Wanted A Portal Musk responded on X to a po...

item.title: Tesla Gets Belgium Approval for Self-Driving Tests
item.description: The supervised software trial could help Tesla move closer to broader European approval.

item.title: Ford Takes On Elon Musk's Tesla Energy Business With New Battery Storage Push
item.description: Ford Motor Co. has unveiled a new, wholly owned subsidiary, Ford Energy, aimed at manufacturing Energy Storage systems at its Kentucky facility, targeting the manufacturing of deployments worth 20GWh annually. Ford Energy To Commence Deliveries In 2027 The company will...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Soaring. Is the $10 Trillion Robotaxi Story Finally a Buy?
item.description: The electric vehicle company's stock has roared back. But can the automaker deliver?

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Cisco Soars On AI Orders After Google, Nvidia, Tesla Lead S&P 500, Nasdaq To Highs
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq ran higher, led by Google, Nvidia, Tesla and other titans. Cisco earnings beat while AI chipmaker Cerebras will price its IPO.

item.title: Tesla Remote Meter
item.description: submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: BYD Exported More Vehicles In April Than Tesla Sold Worldwide*
item.description: One of our readers, “trackdaze,” dropped some pretty crazy stats on our lap last week in response to my article about BYD’s April sales totals and trends. In addition to its sales in China, BYD exported 135,098 vehicles in April — all fully battery electric or plugin hybrid vehicles, of ... [co...

item.title: Tesla’s Berlin Battery Push And China Talks Reshape Global Growth Outlook
item.description: Tesla is committing $250 million to expand battery production at its Berlin gigafactory, with plans to double annual capacity and add more than 1,500 jobs. The investment aims to deepen European supply chain localization and support next generation battery output for the region. At the same time,...

item.title: California just opened $120,000 rebates for electric semis — Tesla Semi qualifies
item.description: California's new Clean Fuel Reward (CCFR) program launched today. Up to $120,000 per vehicle for electric commercial trucks — and the Tesla Semi is explicitly in scope. The numbers: $7,500–$120,000 per vehicle depending on class $250M available in 2026, $1B+ through 2030 Point-of-purchase at auth...

item.title: What Elon Musk hopes to gain from joining Trump's China visit
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) CEO Elon Musk is joining President Trump's visit to China. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian outlines what this could mean for Tesla.

item.title: Nio Swapped 1 Million EV Batteries in a Week While Tesla Owners Waited 30 Minutes to Charge. Is NIO Stock a Buy?
item.description: The Chinese EV maker looks undervalued relative to its growth potential.

item.title: Tesla capex outlook climbs as company deepens AI investments, UBS says
item.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) had its price target raised modestly by UBS to $364 from $352, as the bank said the electric vehicle maker’s first-quarter update further highlighted its transition toward becoming a “physical AI company,” while maintaining a ‘Neutral’ rating on the stock. Shares of...

item.title: Musk’s xAI Races to Get Wall Street Firms to Use Grok Chatbot
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk’s xAI has recruited multiple Wall Street firms with ties to the billionaire’s business empire to test its Grok chatbot, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a push to bolster revenue ahead of parent company SpaceX’s initial public offering.Most Read from ...

item.title: AI In Focus As Top CEOs Head To China For Trade Summit
item.description: US business leaders including Apple Inc.'s Tim Cook and Tesla Inc.'s Elon Musk on Trump's first overseas trip since waging war in the Middle East a 36-hour visit with Xi Jinping that's expected to encompass the war, tariffs and the self-ruled island of Taiwan. The list of attendees until Tuesday ...

item.title: Tesla gets a China win that comes with a warning
item.description: Tesla’s (TSLA) worldwide EV story is looking a bit vulnerable. The car company that appeared to be dictating the pace of the electric vehicle market has spent the past year trying to regain momentum in some of its key locations. Chinese competitors have been quicker on pricing, Europe has grown ...

item.title: Lucid Jumps 9%, NIO Rallies 7%, Tesla Rises 4% as EV Stocks Get Charged Up
item.description: The U.S.-listed electric vehicle complex is catching a coordinated bid in Wednesday’s midday session. Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) shares are up 9% to around $6.57, NIO (NYSE:NIO) stock has rallied 7% to $6.52, and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares have climbed 4% to roughly $450. The move spans geographie...

item.title: Waymo expands robotaxi coverage more than 20% — larger than Rhode Island
item.description: Waymo announced a major expansion of its autonomous robotaxi service area, growing to over 1,400 square miles across 11 US cities. That’s an estimated 27% increase from its previous coverage and more territory than the entire state of Rhode Island. The expansion starts in Miami, with Austin, Atla...

item.title: Tesla gathers 93,000 FSD miles in a country where FSD isn’t approved – here’s how
item.description: Tesla has gathered 93,000 Full Self-Driving miles in a country where Full Self-Driving is not even approved. Here’s how. Tesla has quietly logged an impressive 93,000 miles (roughly 150,000 km) of autonomous driving at its Giga Berlin factory —using Full Self-Driving (FSD) in a country where the ...

item.title: Do Lumpy Q1 Deployments Undermine Tesla's Energy Momentum?
item.description: Lumpy quarterly deployments weigh on TSLA's energy storage volumes, but management expects full-year growth and long-term momentum to be strong.

item.title: Tesla Quietly Doubles Down On Germany
item.description: Berlin expansion highlights focus on vertical integration strategy

item.title: SpaceX And Google Explore Wild AI Infrastructure Idea
item.description: Orbital data centers may tackle future AI power demands

item.title: Elon Musk reveals how SpaceX is always on board Air Force One
item.description: Air Force One, the official call sign for a U.S. Air Force aircraft carrying the President, now runs on SpaceX Starlink, CEO Elon Musk revealed. Musk confirmed Tuesday that Starlink internet is live and kicking on Air Force One.

item.title: How Musk’s Visit to China Could Unlock Tesla’s Next Big Growth Driver
item.description: President Trump is trying to drum up business for Tesla, and other American companies, in China this week.

item.title: Ford Is Up 7% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Car Stocks Like General Motors and Tesla?
item.description: Shares of Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) are up roughly 7% in Wednesday morning trading, climbing to about $12.82 from a prior close of $11.99. The move is the stock’s sharpest single-day gain in weeks, and it stands out against a generally quiet automotive tape. By comparison, Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) s...

item.title: Tesla: It's All Downhill From Here
SpaceX unveils sweeping Starship V3 upgrades ahead of May 19 launch
item.description: SpaceX has unveiled sweeping upgrades to its Starship v3 rocket ahead of the upcoming May 19 launch. SpaceX has released a detailed list of changes for Starship Version 3 , the next iteration of its fully reusable super-heavy-lift vehicle. Scheduled for its maiden flight as early as May 19 from S...
